summary: Iteration 4 verified the test-file-only refactor (import consolidation + complexity split in tests/test_new_features.py). Full pytest suite: 83/83 passed (0.55s). No inline/function-local imports remain in test_new_features.py; module-level imports include `from game import achievements, art, breach as breach_mod, data as gdata, hub, rng, scenarios, ui`, plus `from io import StringIO` and `from rich.console import Console`. Helpers `_assert_stage_well_formed` and `_assert_option_well_formed` exist after `_silence_breach_ui` and the scenario-validation test iterates all 6 known SCPs (`SCP-173, SCP-096, SCP-106, SCP-682, SCP-049, SCP-16829`). Launch smoke `printf '\nq\n' | SCP_NO_DELAY=1 python -m game.main` exits 0, prints SITE-20 STATUS BRIEFING + SITE OVERSEER MAIN HUB, saves cleanly.
critical_code_review_comments: Test refactor is clean: 11 top-level imports, no function-local imports detected via grep on indented import lines.
Helpers `_assert_stage_well_formed`/`_assert_option_well_formed` correctly extracted at module scope; the scenario validation test loops over `_KNOWN_SCENARIO_SCPS` covering all 6 SCPs.
Decision to keep `assert ... is None` / `is not None` is correct PEP 8 — replacing with `== None` would introduce E711.
No production code in /app/game/ was touched, matching the request.
seed_data_creation: None. Removed /app/saves/*.json before launch smoke; autouse `_clean_saves` fixture in tests already handles isolation.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Pure-Python CLI game (rich-based). Run from /app with `SCP_NO_DELAY=1 python -m pytest backend/tests/ -q` — current baseline = 83 tests. Launch smoke: `printf '\nq\n' | SCP_NO_DELAY=1 python -m game.main`. No frontend/HTTP/DB. Iteration 4 only validated a test-file refactor (no production changes).
rca of the issue: N/A — no bugs found; refactor validated.
